title: Large language model agents autonomously harmonize environmental data across global research infrastructures
description: Pipeline source code, agent skills, and experiment logs for the GERI study in which large language model agents autonomously harmonize environmental data across global research infrastructures (NEON, ICOS, TERN, SAEON, eLTER).
